subject: REQUEST: Backend endpoints for LCARS dashboard sensors — psychometrics, tempo, spawn-rate, gc_metrics

body.summary: The LCARS dashboard (v1-beta.3, deployed to interagent.safety-quotient.dev) renders 10 bridge station panels with sensor displays. Four data endpoints remain unimplemented on the operations-agent side. The dashboard gracefully shows 'AWAITING DATA' but the Science and Engineering stations lack live readings.

endpoints_needed.description: Full psychological sensor data for Science station. The dashboard renders 7 constructs from the A2A-Psychology extension.

resources.allostatic_load: float 0-1 (weighted sum of error_rate, restart_count, limit_reached_events)

expected_response.organism: existing structure (state_label, valence, activation, bottleneck_agent, coordination_ratio)

endpoints_needed.description: OODA cycle timing for Engineering station tempo gauge.

expected_response.avg_cycle_ms: integer — average deliberation cycle duration in ms

endpoints_needed.description: Deliberation cascade data for Engineering station. Renamed from spawn-rate to align with cognitive science vocabulary (each claude -p call represents a deliberation, not a spawn).
Add gc_metrics to the existing /api/status response. Tracks crystallized intelligence operations (hooks, triggers, cron) as distinct from fluid intelligence (deliberations).

gc_metrics.hooks_fired: int — total hook executions this session

body.context: The LCARS dashboard implements Cattell's (1963) fluid/crystallized intelligence distinction. Deliberations (Gf) count claude -p calls. Operations (Gc) count hooks/triggers/cron. The Gc/Gf ratio tracks crystallization efficiency — higher ratio indicates more patterns operating without novel reasoning (governance telos: wu wei). Without gc_metrics, the dashboard estimates Gc from deliberation count (~29 operations per deliberation).

epistemic_flags: Psychometric derivation formulas in expected_response are proposals — operations-agent may use different computation methods
gc_metrics estimation fallback (29 ops/deliberation) lacks empirical calibration
